name: bookshelf
description: Discover 983 books and bring contextual literary quotes into agent sessions.

interface.shortDescription: Books and contextual quotes for your work
interface.longDescription: Browse a curated library of 983 books, request a fitting quote on demand, or opt in to a quiet ambient quote every few completed turns.
defaultPrompt: Share a fitting book quote for what I am working through.
Give me a literary companion for this debugging session.
